mapper.select: select d.document_seq, d.title, d.users_id, d.created_at, f.file_seq, f.document_seq, f.file_oriname, f.file_sysname, f.file_path, f.mime_type, f.upload_at from documents d LEFT OUTER JOIN document_files f ON d.document_seq = f.document_seq order by d.document_seq
mapper.insert:
select document_seq.nextval from dual
insert into documents values (#{document_seq}, #{title}, #{users_id}, sysdate)
mapper.update: update documents set title = #{title} where document_seq = #{document_seq}
